label: Transparent moose antler motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a moose antler motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: One sculptural moose antler form inspired by a mature bull moose, broad palmate antlers with natural tines, dark brown bases, antler cream worn highlights, subtle ridged bone texture, large calm silhouette, accurate moose-antler anatomy. Include a minimal dark-brown upper head bridge only if needed to make the antler shape read clearly; no full animal body.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop any tines; balanced large-form silhouette suitable for a catalog motif.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves dark brown antler base, cream antler planes, and natural texture.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no trees, no wetland scene, no decorative background, no second subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Moose light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Moose", derived from a moose antler motif and boreal wetland habitat. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible large-form product system.
Reference motif: broad palmate moose antler, dark brown antler bases, antler cream planes, subtle ridged bone texture, large calm silhouette, spruce forest edge, boreal wetland reeds and mist as contextual texture only.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, 4K-class, crisp readable labels, precise implementation grid, dense but organized UI reference.
Required visible sections: Morphous Moose, Moose Antler, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: dark brown, antler cream, spruce green, wetland moss, peat umber, fog gray, lichen sage, cold water blue-gray, reed straw, and warm bone neutrals derived from the motif and habitat.
Typography: English operational UI guidance with Japanese typography guidance; use a sturdy humanist Latin sans and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, numerals, dense dashboards, and field inspection workflows. Include short Japanese labels such as 個体, 湿地, 検索, 記録, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, habitat map panel, observation table, command palette, search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple antler/spruce-inspired icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, and component density notes.
Style: large form system, calm boreal wetland product UI, antler-cream surfaces, dark-brown primary actions, spruce navigation, moss/sage status accents, peat-umber structure, subtle antler ridge and wetland reed texture, restrained shadows, 8px card radius.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Moose", no tiny illegible paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Moose dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Moose". It must feel like the same large-form boreal wetland product system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the moose antler motif.
Reference motif: broad palmate moose antler, dark brown antler bases, antler cream planes, subtle ridged bone texture, large calm silhouette, spruce forest edge, boreal wetland reeds and mist as contextual texture only.
Reference light-board system details to preserve: dark-brown primary controls, antler-cream surfaces, spruce navigation, moss/sage status accents, peat-umber structure, fog-gray neutrals, precise dashboard/data/forms/table/search/status/token coverage, English and Japanese typography guidance.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, 4K-class, crisp readable labels, precise implementation grid, dense but organized UI reference.
Required visible sections: Morphous Moose, Dark Mode, Moose Antler, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage, Generated Assets.
Typography: English operational UI guidance with Japanese typography guidance; use a sturdy humanist Latin sans and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, numerals, dense dashboards, and field inspection workflows. Include short Japanese labels such as 個体, 湿地, 検索, 記録, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, habitat map panel, observation table, command palette, search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple antler/spruce-inspired icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, and component density notes.
Visual details: deep peat and dark-brown background, elevated panels in spruce charcoal and wetland shadow, antler-cream foreground text, fog-gray muted labels, dark-brown and cream primary/action contrast, spruce-green accents, lichen-sage success states, cold water blue-gray charts, subtle antler ridge and reed texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Moose", no tiny illegible paragraphs.
